original: A modified plasma pistol, tweaked to do maximum damage at the expense of accuracy - despite the fact that it has a swanky scope bolted onto the top. Presumably this hand cannon was customized by Dr. Teyaal, the chief engineer on Zhèng Shi Station. The gun’s almost certainly dangerous to the user if fired for prolonged periods... or if you’re just unlucky. But it will definitely ruin somebody’s day with a couple of well-placed shots.
